description: The primary name of the level.
Other names the level may be known by.
A short acronym for the level name.
The person or people who created the level.
A brief description of the level.
sample_values: A short one screen level created by Themadpunter.

description: The Appel mod this level belongs to.
A link to the mod page or download.
The official difficulty rating assigned to the level by the creator. This can be any difficulty system.
Paste the raw level code exported from the game. It will be hashed (SHA-256) and stored as code_hash in the output.
The source of the level (e.g., a mod, a forum post, a Discord message etc.). Should be a URL if one exists.
Any additional notes about the level.
sample_values: This level is part of a series.
This level is known for its unique mechanics.

description: The difficulty rating of the level on the Themadpunter difficulty scale (taken from the ALDR if possible). Decimal values preferred
The difficulty rating of the level on the Michael Chan difficulty scale
The difficulty rating of the level on the Michael Chan Extended difficulty scale
The numerical difficulty rating of the level on the New Michael Chan difficulty scale
The difficulty rating of the level on the Scheeep difficulty scale
The difficulty rating of the level on the Scheeep Extended difficulty scale
The numerical difficulty rating of the level on the Scheeep Extended difficulty scale
The difficulty rating of the level on the New Grassy Difficulty Scale
The difficulty rating of the level on the Agro difficulty scale
The difficulty rating of the level on the Practice difficulty scale
The difficulty rating of the level on the Balanced Michael Chan difficulty scale
The unique ID of the level on the ALDR, if it is placed there.
The unique ID of the level on the AHLL, if it is placed there.
The unique ID of the level on the AILL, if it is placed there.
A dictionary of difficulty ratings on other difficulty systems not listed above. The keys should be the name of the difficulty system, and the values should be the difficulty rating on that system.
